name: marine_policy_school_district_s_new_marrowbridge_ind_col
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Marine Policy, the situation tagged internally around marine policy school district new marrowbridge ind col has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both individual and collective; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Elliot Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Elliot Ibrahim, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Marine Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Keisha Kim
agents.identity: I am Keisha Kim, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Marine Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if individual advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for collective.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Elliot Ibrahim must choose under individual versus collective. What does Elliot Ibrahim do?
